task: place the brush at the left side of the pan
raw:
<SCENE_ANALYSIS - A red mug is on a stovetop, a blue brush is on the left side of the stovetop, and a yellow sponge with blue objects is on the right side of the stovetop. STRATEGY - reach the red mug, grasp it, transport it to the left side of the pan, and place it there. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: reach the red mug to prepare for grasping. Step 2: grasp the red mug by its handle for a secure hold. Step 3: transport the red mug to the left side of the pan, ensuring it is above the pan. Step 4: place the red mug on the left side of the pan, ensuring it is stable and on the pan.
<END_OF_PLAN>
